speaker: UNKNOWN
text: The King’s a beggar, now the play is done.

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: All is well ended if this suit be won,

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: That you express content, which we will pay,

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: With strift to please you, day exceeding day.

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: Ours be your patience, then, and yours our parts.

speaker: UNKNOWN
text: Your gentle hands lend us, and take our hearts.
